title: Muslin Cloths for Baby 100% Cotton Muslin Squares Baby Wash Cloth Baby Essentials for Newborn Boys Girls Large 30x30CM Extra Soft and Absorbent 6 Pack - Multicolor
features: Prioritize Safety: Made of 100% natural cotton to guarantee the utmost comfort and soft, Unnivoll muslin cloths for baby have passed CPSC certification, ensuring safety for infant's delicate skin, providing a worry-free experience for you and your little one. Rest assured in your selection.

Soft and Absorbent: Featuring 6 layers of absorbent muslin and fluffy structure design, our high-loft muslin squares for babies provide exceptional absorbency and a soft touch just like marshmallows. Perfect for baby baths, quickly wiping up spills or any accidental liquid mess.

Pratical Design: The 6 pack baby muslin washcloths are thoughtfully designed in a generous size of 12"x12", offering a perfect balance between functionality and portability. Lanyard design make it easy to hang or dry, avoid germs accumulating. Reinforced edges make the baby wash cloths can withstand repeated washing while retaining its shape.

Fresh elegant color: Inspired by rainbows, each set of muslin washcloths comes with 6 vibrant colors, adding a touch of vibrancy to bath time. Suitable for both boys and girls, bright and lively colors are sure to captivate your little one's eyes. Babies and parents will love the vibrant and bold colors baby washcloths.

Verstile Baby Essentials: Designed with a gender-neutral color, our muslin baby washcloths will be a thoughtful present for any occasion like baby shower, baby registry, birthday, or you can use it as baby face towels, hand towels, baby wipes, Baby Wash Cloth, sweat cloths, even makeup removers. A must-have for teething baby and mess no more.
